label: Improved
items: Your Plants and Watchlist now sort themselves — Active (growing or affecting your garden right now), Inactive (finished, with history kept), and Saved/Watching (on your list, nothing live yet). No more manual archiving to keep lists tidy: the app works it out from what's actually in your beds.
Removing a plant from your garden now quiets its care schedules too (and saving it back restores them). Long-finished plants that were stuck invisible now show properly under Inactive.
